colorMatch.title: Color Match
colorMatch.description: Match colors by dragging items to the right place!
colorMatch.instructions: Drag the colored shape to the matching color zone
colorMatch.dropInZone: Now drop the shape on the matching color zone!

instructions.step0Desc: All the cards are face-down. Your job is to find every matching pair by flipping just two cards at a time.
instructions.step1Desc: Flip two cards. If they show the same picture — great, they stay face-up! If not, they flip back. Try to remember where each picture was.
instructions.step2Desc: The fewer moves you use, the better your score. Pay attention and use your brain like a camera!
instructions.control0Desc: Click or tap a card to flip it
instructions.control1Desc: Arrow keys to move between cards
instructions.control2Desc: Enter or Space to flip selected card
instructions.tip: Start by flipping cards in order — it helps you build a mental map of where things are!

flappyBird.title: Flappy Bird
flappyBird.description: Tap to fly through the pipes!

instructions.step0Desc: Tap the screen, click mouse, or press Space to make the bird fly up. When you stop, the bird falls down!
instructions.step1Desc: Don't hit the green pipes or the ground. Fly through the gaps between pipes to score points!
instructions.step2Desc: Every 5 pipes you pass, advance to the next level! Pipes move faster and gaps get smaller!
instructions.step3Desc: Reach the target score to win the game!
instructions.tip: Pro tip: Don't tap too hard! Gentle, quick taps help you maintain steady height.

instructions.step0Desc: Waves of angry chickens are invading from space! They march across the sky and drop eggs on you. Your job is to zap them all before they reach your spaceship.
instructions.step1Desc: Move your spaceship left and right at the bottom of the screen. Press fire to shoot lasers up at the chickens. Each chicken you hit disappears in a puff of feathers!
instructions.step2Desc: Chickens drop eggs that fall toward you. If an egg hits your ship you lose a life. Dodge them by moving out of the way!
instructions.step3Desc: Normal chickens = 10 pts. Golden chickens = 50 pts! Clear all chickens in a wave to advance. Beat all waves to win!
instructions.control0Desc: Arrow keys or A/D to move left/right
instructions.tip: Focus on dodging eggs first — you can always shoot more chickens, but you only have a few lives!

instructions.step0Desc: Blocks fall from the top. Use arrow keys to move them left, right, and down. Press up arrow or click to rotate!
instructions.step1Desc: When you fill a complete row with no gaps, it disappears and you earn points! Clear more lines at once for bigger scores!
instructions.step2Desc: Clear 10 lines to level up! Each level makes blocks fall faster. Can you reach level 10?
instructions.step3Desc: Reach 1000 points to win! One line = 100, two = 300, three = 500, four (Tetris!) = 800 points!
instructions.tip: Pro tip: Use Space to hard-drop instantly. Clear 4 lines at once (a "Tetris") for maximum points!

checkers.title: Checkers
checkers.description: Play checkers with different difficulty levels
checkers.learn_mode_hint: In Learn mode, you play without an opponent. Use hints to learn the rules!

instructions.step0Desc: Capture all of your opponent's pieces — or block them so they can't move. You play the red pieces and the computer plays black.
instructions.step1Desc: Pieces move diagonally, one square at a time, on the dark squares. Regular pieces can only move forward (up the board).
instructions.step2Desc: If an opponent's piece is next to yours diagonally with an empty square behind it, you MUST jump over it to capture it. You can chain multiple jumps in one turn!
instructions.step3Desc: When your piece reaches the far side of the board it becomes a King! Kings can move and jump both forward AND backward.
instructions.control0Desc: Click a red piece to select it, then click a green square to move
instructions.control1Desc: Arrow keys to move the cursor on the board
instructions.control2Desc: Enter to select a piece or confirm a move
instructions.control3Desc: Press the Hint button to see a suggested move
instructions.tip: Try to keep your pieces together and control the center of the board. If you must jump, you must — those are the rules!

reversi.title: Reversi
reversi.learn_mode_hint: In Learn mode, you play without an opponent. Use hints to learn the rules!

instructions.step0Desc: Have more pieces than your opponent when the board is full. You play as Black, the computer plays as White.
instructions.step1Desc: Place your piece so opponent pieces are sandwiched between your new piece and another of yours. All sandwiched pieces flip to your color! You can flip in any direction: horizontal, vertical, or diagonal.
instructions.step2Desc: You can only place a piece where it flips at least one opponent piece. Green dots show where you can play. If you have no valid moves, your turn is skipped.
instructions.step3Desc: The game ends when neither player can move or the board is full. Count the pieces -- whoever has more wins!

controls.control0Desc: Click a green dot to place your piece
controls.control1Desc: Arrow keys to move cursor on the board
controls.control2Desc: Enter to place a piece at cursor
controls.control3Desc: Click Hint to see a suggested move

reversi.tip: Corners are super powerful! Once you capture a corner, those pieces never get flipped. Try to get corners early, and avoid squares right next to corners.

chess.title: Chess
chess.description: Play classic chess with different difficulty levels
chess.learn_mode_hint: In Learn mode, you play without an opponent. Use hints to learn the rules!

instructions.step0Desc: Trap your opponent's King so it can't escape -- that's checkmate! Think of it as a tag game where the King can't run away.
instructions.step1Desc: You have 16 pieces. Pawns move forward one step (two on first move). Rooks go straight. Knights jump in an L and can leap over others! Bishops go diagonal. The Queen goes any direction -- she's the most powerful. The King moves one step.
instructions.step2Desc: Land on a square with an opponent's piece to capture it. But watch out -- they can capture yours too!
instructions.step3Desc: When you attack the King and it cannot escape, block, or capture the attacker -- that's checkmate. You win!

controls.control0Desc: Click piece to select, click where to move
controls.control1Desc: Arrow keys to move cursor, Enter to select/place
controls.control2Desc: Tab to cycle through your pieces

chess.tip: Control the center of the board! Pieces in the middle can reach more squares.

backgammon.title: Backgammon
backgammon.learn_mode_hint: In Learn mode, you play without an opponent. Use hints to learn the rules!

instructions.step0Desc: Move your 15 checkers (white) around the board and bear them off before your opponent does. Think of it as a race!
instructions.step1Desc: Roll two dice each turn. Each die tells you how many points to move one checker. If you roll doubles, you get four moves!
instructions.step2Desc: If you land on a point with just ONE opponent checker, you hit it -- it goes to the bar and must re-enter before moving.
instructions.step3Desc: Once ALL your checkers are in your home board (the last 6 points), you can start bearing them off. First to bear off all 15 wins!

controls.control0Desc: Click a checker to select, then click destination

backgammon.tip: Try to keep your checkers in pairs -- lone checkers can be hit!

armyRunner.title: Army Runner 3D
armyRunner.description: Lead your army through gates, dodge obstacles, and crush enemies!

instructions.step0Desc: Your army runs forward automatically. Just steer left and right!
instructions.step1Desc: Pass through math gates like +5 or ×2 to grow your army bigger.
instructions.step2Desc: Avoid spinning bars, moving walls, and saw blades — they shrink your army!
instructions.step3Desc: Crash into red enemy groups. The bigger army wins the fight!
instructions.control0Desc: Swipe or drag left/right to move
instructions.control1Desc: Arrow keys or A/D to steer
instructions.tip: Multiply gates (×2, ×3) are more powerful than add gates when your army is big!

shapeSorter3D.title: 3D Shape Sorter
shapeSorter3D.description: Sort 3D shapes into the right slots! Learn cubes, spheres, and more!
shapeSorter3D.selectShape: Click a shape, then click its matching slot!

instructions.step0Desc: Click or tap any 3D shape floating in space to select it. It will glow when selected!
instructions.step1Desc: Look for the glowing slot that matches your selected shape, then click it to sort!
instructions.step2Desc: Sort all shapes before time runs out. Harder difficulties have more shapes and less time!
instructions.control0Desc: Click a shape, then click its matching slot
instructions.control1Desc: Tab to cycle shapes, Enter to select, arrow keys for slots
instructions.tip: Look at the shape outlines on the slots — they show you exactly which shape goes where!
instructions.ctrl0Desc: Click a shape to select it
instructions.ctrl1Desc: Click the matching slot to place it

solarSystem3D.title: Solar System Explorer
solarSystem3D.subtitle: Click any planet or star to explore!
solarSystem3D.step0Desc: Drag to rotate the solar system. Scroll to zoom. No time limit — explore at your own pace!
solarSystem3D.step1Desc: Click any planet to focus the camera on it and read amazing facts!
solarSystem3D.step2Desc: The bright stars in the background are real! Click them to learn their distance and story.
solarSystem3D.ctrl0Desc: Drag to rotate camera, scroll to zoom
solarSystem3D.ctrl1Desc: Click any planet to focus and learn
solarSystem3D.ctrl2Desc: Click distant stars to learn about them
solarSystem3D.ctrl3Desc: Tap "Explore Earth" for the Earth scene
solarSystem3D.tip: Try clicking Saturn and zooming in — you can see its rings up close!

numberTower3D.title: 3D Number Tower
numberTower3D.description: Stack number blocks to reach the target sum! Build a tower with math!
numberTower3D.catchBlock: Catch numbered blocks to build your tower!

instructions.step0Desc: A target number appears at the top. Build a tower whose blocks add up to exactly that number!
instructions.step1Desc: Number blocks fall from the sky. Click a block or press Space to catch it.
instructions.step2Desc: If your tower sum equals the target — you win the round! Stack too high and the tower falls!
instructions.control0Desc: Click a falling block to catch it
instructions.control1Desc: Space bar or Enter to catch the highlighted block
instructions.tip: Think before you catch — if the target is 7 and you have 5, only catch a 2!
instructions.ctrl0Desc: Click a falling block to catch it
instructions.ctrl1Desc: Space or Enter to catch highlighted block

snake.title: Snake
snake.learnDesc: Big & slow, perfect for little kids!

instructions.step0Desc: Use arrow keys or WASD to move the snake. Eat red fruits to grow and score points!
instructions.step1Desc: As you level up, gray obstacles appear. Don't hit them or yourself!
instructions.step2Desc: Collect 50 points each level to advance. Each level adds speed and obstacles!
instructions.step3Desc: Reach level 5 and 250 points to win the game!
instructions.tip: Pro tip: Plan your path ahead! Don't just focus on the next fruit - think about where your tail will be.

whackAMole.title: Whack-a-Mole
whackAMole.easyDesc: For little ones — slower moles, no bombs

instructions.step0Desc: Little moles peek out of holes in the ground. Your job is to bonk them on the head before they hide again!
instructions.step1Desc: Click or tap a mole to whack it. Each mole you hit gives you points. Golden moles are worth extra!
instructions.step2Desc: Black round things with a fuse are bombs — do NOT hit them or you lose 50 points. Only whack the moles!
instructions.step3Desc: You have limited time. Whack as many moles as you can before the timer runs out. Hit moles in a row for combo bonus!
instructions.control0Desc: Click or tap on moles to whack them
instructions.control2Desc: Escape to go back to menu
instructions.tip: Keep your eyes on the whole field — don't focus on just one hole. Quick combos multiply your score!

dinoRun.title: Dino Run
dinoRun.tapToStart: Press Space or Click to Jump

instructions.step0Desc: You are a little dinosaur running through the desert. The ground scrolls automatically — you just need to survive!
instructions.step1Desc: Cacti, rocks, meteors, and flying birds will try to stop you. Jump over ground obstacles and duck under birds!
instructions.step2Desc: The longer you survive, the faster things move. New obstacle types appear as your score grows — watch out for falling meteors!
instructions.step3Desc: Collect floating coins for bonus points! Grab shields for invincibility or slow-mo to freeze time. Chain coins for combo bonuses!
instructions.step4Desc: The world shifts between day and night as you run. Stay focused — obstacles are the same in the dark!
instructions.tip: Ducking only helps avoid birds — you still need to jump over cacti and rocks!

instructions.step0Desc: Place towers along the path to stop enemies from reaching the end.
instructions.step1Desc: Enemies follow a fixed path. Destroy them before they escape!
instructions.step2Desc: Each enemy killed gives gold. Use gold to buy more towers.
instructions.step3Desc: Beat every wave to win. Protect your lives!
instructions.control0Desc: Click on empty grass tiles to place towers
instructions.control2Desc: Press 2 for Sniper Tower (long range, high damage)
instructions.tip: Place towers near path curves so they can shoot enemies for longer!

instructions.step0Desc: Race against 3 computer runners! Be the first to cross the finish line. Think of it like drumming your fingers as fast as you can on a table — the faster you tap, the faster you run!
instructions.step1Desc: After the 3-2-1-GO countdown, tap the screen, click the mouse, or mash the Space bar as fast as you can. Each tap gives your runner a burst of speed. Stop tapping and you slow down!
instructions.step2Desc: Cross the finish line before all opponents. Your best time is saved so you can try to beat your own record!
instructions.tip: Find a steady fast rhythm instead of random mashing — consistent speed beats wild clicking!

instructions.step0Desc: Use the paddle to bounce the ball and break all the bricks. Move the paddle with your mouse or keyboard!
instructions.step1Desc: Different bricks are worth different points! Top bricks (red) = 50, orange = 40, yellow = 30, green = 20, blue = 10.
instructions.step2Desc: Break all bricks to advance to the next level! Each level adds more rows and the ball moves faster!
instructions.step3Desc: Don't let the ball fall below the paddle! If you lose all lives, game over.
instructions.tip: Pro tip: Hit the ball with the edges of the paddle to change its angle. This helps reach difficult bricks!

instructions.step0Desc: Move your mouse or drag to control your paddle at the bottom of the table
instructions.step1Desc: The ball bounces at different angles based on where it hits the paddle
instructions.step2Desc: Be the first to reach the required score to win!
instructions.step3Desc: The longer the rally, the faster the ball gets!
instructions.tip: Try hitting the ball with the edge of the paddle to create sharp angles!

instructions.step0Desc: Use arrow keys or buttons to steer and accelerate
instructions.step1Desc: Complete the required number of laps to finish the race
instructions.step2Desc: Finish in the top 3 to unlock the next race!
instructions.step3Desc: 5 levels from training to championship — each one harder!
instructions.step4Desc: Press Space to request a pit stop. Tires wear out — change them in time!
instructions.tip: On Easy, the car auto-accelerates — just steer!

instructions.step0Desc: Select potions from the shelf by clicking bottles or pressing number keys 1-8.
instructions.step1Desc: Use the heat slider to set the right temperature. Each creature needs a specific heat range!
instructions.step2Desc: Press Space or click Stir to mix. More stirs = better results. Each recipe has a minimum.
instructions.step3Desc: Hit Brew to see what creature you've made! Match the recipe perfectly for 3 stars.
instructions.tip: Start with stir count — it's the easiest thing to get right. Then nail the heat range for 3 stars!

instructions.title: How to Play
instructions.step1: Buy tanks from the shop using gold
instructions.step2: Tap two identical tanks together to merge them into a stronger tank
instructions.step3: Place your tanks on the grid, then press Start Battle
instructions.step4: Watch your tanks fight automatically! Win to earn gold and advance
instructions.tip: Range tanks attack from far away. Melee tanks hit hard up close!
